untranslatable_reason: Diamond top pattern formation requires visual pattern recognition (support/resistance identification, retracement levels, breakout confirmation) which cannot be expressed using only the provided technical indicators. The exact formulas for stop placement and target calculation are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Pattern detection requires candlestick/geometric analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal requires: (1) Diamond top pattern visual identification - not available via indicators; (2) Breakout confirmation - approximated as close crossing below previous support; (3) Risk/reward ratio validation (1:2 minimum) - requires pattern-derived levels not calculable from available indicators; (4) Stop above resistance and target based on support-resistance difference - both AUTHOR_SILENT. Conservative approximation used: enter on downside breakout (close < prev_close), exit on reversal above prior high. Recommend manual pattern validation before backtest.
